name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-3
title: Post-consolidation cleanup: fix absorbed SKILL.md script path, retire Inv 24/32, delete 13 dead absorbed tests, update spec narratives
description:
Post-consolidation audit findings for rabbit-feature:

1. CRITICAL RUNTIME BUG: .claude/features/rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-scope/SKILL.md:20 still references the retired script path .claude/features/rabbit-feature-scope/scripts/resolve-scope.py. Should be .claude/features/rabbit-feature/scripts/resolve-scope.py. Also deployed copy at .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-scope/SKILL.md has same bug. Any caller following the skill verbatim hits file-not-found.
2. SKILL.md owner field says 'rabbit-feature-scope' (retired) — should be 'rabbit-feature'.
3. Retire Inv 24 and Inv 32 from spec.md (byte-identical-to-source invariants are now unsatisfiable since source dirs were emptied).
4. Delete or rewire the 13 dead absorbed tests with hardcoded paths pointing at retired rabbit-feature-scope/ and rabbit-spec/ source dirs. Currently 18 of 28 rabbit-feature tests fail because of this.
5. Update spec.md narrative (lines 24-26, 30-35) and feature.json:7 summary to reflect that source dirs have been emptied (no longer 'will be deleted in a separate cycle' — that cycle has happened, partially).
6. Add tests for new invariants 5-8 and 13-23/25-31 with the correct new numbering.
7. Update test-bug-9-inv10-coverage-meta.py to cover the renumbered spec.
